Headline: #49 Western Temporary Reroute at Western/57th
ShortDescription: #49 Western buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Western, 59th, Damen, 55th and Western due to street blockage near Western/57th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#49 Western buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Western, 59th, Damen, 55th, then will resume their normal route on Western.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Western/57th.
